title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Air India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India:
Air India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
